sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55773" key="katentrufa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατεν-τρῠφάω</orth>, c. gen., <sense id="n55773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐντρυφάω κατά τινος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1441.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iamb.Bab.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
